data.title: Bitwise Donates $100,000 to Support Ethereum Open Source Developers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitwise donated $100,000 to support Ethereum open source developers. When the Bitwise Ethereum ETF ($ETHW) is launched in July 2024, Bitwise promises to give back 10% of ETHW's gross profit to the Ethereum ecosystem each year. This is reportedly Bitwise's first annual donation for 2024. The funds will be used for two non-profit projects, Protocol Guild and PBS Foundation. Previously, Bitwise also announced that it had donated $150,000 to support Bitcoin open source developers.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 650 USDT with a 0.54% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 19, 2025, 15:02 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 650 USDT and is now trading at 649.210022 USDT, with a narrowed 0.54% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: CoinDesk 20 Index Sees Positive Gains Across All Assets
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, the CoinDesk 20 Index has shown a notable increase, reaching 3194.09, which marks a 3.3% rise, or an increase of 101.56 points, since 4 p.m. ET on Tuesday. This positive trend is reflected across all 20 assets within the index, indicating a strong performance in the market.

Among the top performers, APT has surged by 16.6%, while LTC has seen a significant rise of 7.3%. These assets have led the charge in the index's upward movement. On the other hand, BTC and ADA, although categorized as laggards, have still managed to post gains of 2.4% each, contributing to the overall positive sentiment in the market.

The CoinDesk 20 Index is a comprehensive index that is traded on various platforms across multiple regions worldwide. This broad-based index provides a snapshot of the market's performance, showcasing the dynamic nature of the cryptocurrency landscape. The current upward trend in the index reflects a period of growth and optimism among investors.

data.title: Hashdex Receives Approval For XRP Spot ETF In Brazil
data.description: According to Foresight News, Hashdex has secured approval from the Brazilian Securities and Exchange Commission to launch an XRP spot ETF in Brazil. The specific listing date on the Brazilian stock exchange B3 has not yet been determined.

data.title: Gate.io presents Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival as the title sponsor, and joins hands with electronic music pioneer KSHMR to create a model side event
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival, exclusively sponsored by Gate.io, debuted in Hong Kong. This music festival is the largest official special event of the Consensus conference. The global electronic music pioneer KSHMR was invited to the stage. Many Web3 industry leaders gathered together to witness the brilliant moment. KSHMR, a leading figure in the international electronic music scene, is renowned worldwide for his unique musical style and superb production skills, and many of his classic works are deeply loved by music fans. In 2025, the Consensus Conference landed in Hong Kong for the first time. This performance not only successfully realized the debut of the Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival, but also opened up new dimensions for the integration of Web3 and the music industry in an innovative form.
Since its establishment in 2013, Gate.io has had more than 21 million users and its market share ranks among the top 4 in the industry. In 2025, Gate.io officially became the exclusive cryptocurrency exchange partner of the F1 Red Bull Team, further expanding the global influence of blockchain.
Disclaimer
This event is for entertainment and social purposes only. The content of this article does not constitute an offer, solicitation or recommendation of any product or service. Gate.io does not promote or provide any products or services in Hong Kong and other restricted regions. Please note that Gate.io may limit or prohibit the use of all or part of its Services in restricted regions.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,700 USDT with a Narrowed 0.74% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 19, 2025, 14:51 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,700 USDT and is now trading at 2,699.919922 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.74% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net outflow of 1,288 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net inflow of 934 ETH
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, today, ten US Bitcoin ETFs had a net outflow of 1,288 BTC (US$124.38 million), of which Bitwise had an outflow of 1,198 BTC (US$115.65 million), and Bitwise currently holds 39,954 BTC (US$3.86 billion); 
Nine Ethereum ETFs had a net inflow of 934 ETH (US$2.55 million), of which Fidelity had an inflow of 1,749 ETH (US$4.77 million), and Fidelity currently holds 458,653 ETH (US$1.25 billion).

data.title: SlowMist Founder Warns Of Impersonation Scam
data.description: According to Odaily, SlowMist founder Yu Jian has issued a warning on the X platform about individuals impersonating SlowMist employees to conduct scams and steal cryptocurrency. Yu Jian stated that they have gathered substantial information about the perpetrators, including details of another active X account. He advised the individuals involved to return the stolen funds.

data.title: Bitget will list Kaito (KAITO)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Bitget will launch Kaito (KAITO), and trading is expected to start at 21:00 on February 20, 2025, Beijing time.

data.title: US SEC confirms that COINSHARES SPOT XRP ETF application has been submitted
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) confirmed that the COINSHARES SPOT XRP ETF application has been submitted.
